title: teucrium canadense var. virginicum
intro: Teucrium canadense var. virginicum, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its clusters of blue-purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Wood Betony include relief from headaches, fever, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and alleviate stress. Wood Betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements.
